CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_docs', false, 'quFkNIUZZFAwcn0ok74-KsIERem9u0p5DW-cqEgxrPA', 'v3.5.0--tJKkz522pazf9KPO8IsLOCK1BOVXgATAfqrp3z-o3ZM', '7XYE9DxjCKPSKR-6VVmydkEnzI6Ds-lbXHfdqXDuosc'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_docs; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_docs (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_docs VALUES ('docs/01-getting-started.md', '1. Getting Started', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"iridis is a chromatic pipeline for dynamic palette derivation. You give it seed colors (hex, RGB, OKLCH, etc.). It runs them through a registered sequence of tasks—intake, role resolution, contrast enforcement, variant derivation, and emission—and returns a role-resolved palette plus any consumer-shaped outputs you requested (CSS variables, Tailwind, Shadcn, MUI, Capacitor, etc.)."],["p",{},"The core (",["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis"],") ships with zero runtime dependencies. Each output target is a separate plugin package."],["h2",{"id":"installation"},"Installation"],["p",{},"Install the core package, plus any output plugins you need."],["pre",{"className":"language-bash shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"# Core only\nnpm install @studnicky/iridis\n\n# W3C contrast checking + Stylesheet + Shadcn UI outputs\nnpm install @studnicky/iridis \\\n  @studnicky/iridis-contrast \\\n  @studnicky/iridis-stylesheet \\\n  @studnicky/iridis-shadcn\n","language":"bash","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"# Core only\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"sBMFI"},"npm"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," install"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," @studnicky/iridis\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"# W3C contrast checking + Stylesheet + Shadcn UI outputs\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sBMFI"},"npm"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," install"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," @studnicky/iridis"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," \\\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"  @studnicky/iridis-contrast"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," \\\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"  @studnicky/iridis-stylesheet"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," \\\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"  @studnicky/iridis-shadcn\n"]]]],["h2",{"id":"the-simplest-call-quickpalette"},"The simplest call (",["code",{},"quickPalette"],")"],["p",{},"For basic use cases, you don''t even need to configure an engine. Use the ",["code",{},"quickPalette"]," helper:"],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"import { quickPalette } from ''@studnicky/iridis'';\n\nconst palette = await quickPalette([''#7c3aed'', ''#06b6d4''], ''dark'');\n// → { background: ''#07061a'', foreground: ''#f0f0ff'', accent: ''#7c3aed'', muted: ''#7e7e9a'' }\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"import"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," quickPalette"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"}," from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"@studnicky/iridis"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," palette "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"}," await"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," quickPalette"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"(["],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"#7c3aed"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"#06b6d4"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"]"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"dark"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},")"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"// → { background: ''#07061a'', foreground: ''#f0f0ff'', accent: ''#7c3aed'', muted: ''#7e7e9a'' }\n"]]]],["p",{},"One import, one call. No schema to define, no pipeline to declare. The framing argument (",["code",{},"''dark''"]," or ",["code",{},"''light''"],") picks the clamp envelopes, and everything else uses sensible defaults."],["h2",{"id":"long-form-engine-api"},"Long-form Engine API"],["p",{},"When you need custom schemas, explicit contrast checking, or plugin emitters, construct the ",["code",{},"Engine"]," directly."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"import { Engine, coreTasks }  from ''@studnicky/iridis'';\nimport { stylesheetPlugin }   from ''@studnicky/iridis-stylesheet'';\nimport { shadcnPlugin }       from ''@studnicky/iridis-shadcn'';\n\nconst engine = new Engine();\n// Register core tasks\nfor (const task of coreTasks) engine.tasks.register(task);\n\n// Adopt output plugins\nengine.adopt(stylesheetPlugin);\nengine.adopt(shadcnPlugin);\n\n// Declare the execution sequence\nengine.pipeline([\n  ''intake:any'',\n  ''expand:family'',\n  ''resolve:roles'',\n  ''enforce:contrast'',\n  ''derive:variant'',\n  ''emit:cssVars'',\n  ''emit:shadcnVars''\n]);\n\n// Run the pipeline\nconst state = await engine.run({\n  colors: [''#8B5CF6''],\n  roles: yourRoleSchema,\n  contrast: { level: ''AA'' },\n});\n\n// The results are available in state.outputs\nconsole.log(state.outputs[''stylesheet:cssVars'']);\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"import"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," Engine"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," coreTasks"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"  from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"@studnicky/iridis"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"import"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," stylesheetPlugin"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"   from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," shadcnPlugin"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"       from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," engine "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," new"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," tasks\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"for"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," ("],["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," task "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"of"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," coreTasks) Adopt output plugins\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"engine"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"adopt"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"(stylesheetPlugin)"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"engine"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"adopt"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"(shadcnPlugin)"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"// Declare the execution sequence\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"engine"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"pipeline"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"([\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":15},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"  ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"intake:any"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":16},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"  colors"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," The results are available in primitives"],["p",{},"iridis exports every internal colour-math primitive as a singleton class. If you only need to calculate WCAG contrast or convert OKLCH to RGB, you can import them directly without touching the pipeline:"],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"import { luminance, contrastWcag21, oklchToRgb } from ''@studnicky/iridis'';\n\nconst ratio = contrastWcag21.apply(foreground, background);\nconst rgb = oklchToRgb.apply(0.62, 0.18, 290);\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"import"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," luminance"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," contrastWcag21"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," oklchToRgb"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"}," from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"@studnicky/iridis"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," ratio "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," contrastWcag21"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"apply"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"(foreground"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," background)"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," rgb "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," oklchToRgb"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"apply"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"("],["span",{"class":"sbssI"},"0.62"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sbssI"}," 0.18"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sbssI"}," 290"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},")"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]]]],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .sHwdD, html code.shiki .sHwdD{--shiki-light:#90A4AE;--shiki-light-font-style:italic;--shiki-default:#546E7A;--shiki-default-font-style:italic;--shiki-dark:#676E95;--shiki-dark-font-style:italic}html pre.shiki code .sBMFI, var(--shiki-light-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-light-text-decoration);}html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: derive a contrast-enforced palette in one line or wire up the engine directly.', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/01-getting-started', '{"title":"1. Getting Started","description":"Install @studnicky/iridis and derive a contrast-enforced palette in one line or wire up the engine directly."}', '01-getting-started', 'Vc-1-dfEHaiyHy2RoAqodamMkiUkYn2So-kGysyO59s'); -- Vc-1-dfEHaiyHy2RoAqodamMkiUkYn2So-kGysyO59s
INSERT INTO _content_docs VALUES ('docs/02-architecture.md', '2. Core Architecture', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"The interactive controls above demonstrate ",["em",{},"what"]," the pipeline does. This section covers ",["em",{},"how"]," it works under the hood."],["p",{},"Every iridis pipeline passes through four conceptual stages, even though the task names and execution order are fully controlled by you:"],["pre",{"className":["language-text"],"code":"intake → resolve → enforce → emit\n","language":"text"},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},"intake → resolve → enforce → emit\n"]],["h2",{"id":"the-data-flow"},"The Data Flow"],["mermaid-diagram",{"code":"flowchart TD\n    A[\"input.colors\\n(raw strings / objects)\"]\n    B[\"state.colors\\n(ColorRecord[])\"]\n    C[\"state.roles\\n(Record<string, ColorRecord>)\"]\n    D[\"state.roles\\n(contrast-adjusted)\"]\n    E[\"state.variants\\n(light / dark)\"]\n    F[\"state.outputs\\n(cssVars, tailwind, shadcn ...)\"]\n\n    A -->|intake tasks| B\n    B -->|resolve:roles| C\n    C -->|enforce:contrast| D\n    D -->|derive:variant| E\n    D -->|emit tasks| F\n    E -->|emit tasks| F\n"}],["h2",{"id":"the-task-registry"},"The Task Registry"],["p",{},"The ",["code",{},"TaskRegistry"]," is the spine of the engine. It acts as a map of ",["code",{},"TaskInterface"]," objects. Every task has a string ",["code",{},"name"]," (e.g., ",["code",{},"''intake:any''"],")."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"import { TaskRegistry } from ''@studnicky/iridis'';\n\nconst registry = new TaskRegistry();\nregistry.register(myCustomTask);\nregistry.has(''my:custom'');          // true\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"import"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," TaskRegistry"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"}," from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"@studnicky/iridis"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," registry "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," new"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," TaskRegistry"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"()"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"registry"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"register"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"(myCustomTask)"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"registry"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"has"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"("],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"my:custom"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},")"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";"],["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"          // true\n"]]]],["p",{},"The ",["code",{},"Engine"]," owns one ",["code",{},"TaskRegistry"]," instance (",["code",{},"engine.tasks"],"). When you call ",["code",{},"engine.pipeline([''intake:any'', ''resolve:roles'', ...])"],", the engine validates that every name is registered before storing the execution sequence."],["h2",{"id":"shared-state"},"Shared State"],["p",{},"Every task receives the same mutable ",["code",{},"PaletteStateInterface"]," object during execution. Tasks read from and write to named slots on this state."],["p",{},"A task''s dependencies are documented via the ",["code",{},"reads"]," and ",["code",{},"writes"]," arrays in its manifest (which you can see visualized in the ",["strong",{},"Pipeline"]," accordion above)."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"readonly manifest: TaskManifestInterface = {\n  name:    ''resolve:roles'',\n  reads:   [''colors'', ''input.roles''],\n  writes:  [''roles'', ''metadata''],\n};\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"readonly "],["span",{"class":"sBMFI"},"manifest"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," TaskManifestInterface "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  name"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"    ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"resolve:roles"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  reads"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"   ["],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"colors"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"input.roles"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"]"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  writes"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  ["],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"roles"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"metadata"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"]"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"};\n"]]]],["p",{},"The engine ",["strong",{},"does not"]," enforce dependency ordering at runtime—that is your responsibility via the pipeline array. If a task writes ",["code",{},"state.roles"]," and a later task reads ",["code",{},"state.roles"],", your ",["code",{},"engine.pipeline()"]," array must reflect that execution order."],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .s7zQu, html code.shiki .s7zQu{--shiki-light:#39ADB5;--shiki-light-font-style:italic;--shiki-default:#89DDFF;--shiki-default-font-style:italic;--shiki-dark:#89DDFF;--shiki-dark-font-style:italic}html pre.shiki code .sMK4o, html code.shiki .sMK4o{--shiki-light:#39ADB5;--shiki-default:#89DDFF;--shiki-dark:#89DDFF}html pre.shiki code .sTEyZ, html code.shiki .sTEyZ{--shiki-light:#90A4AE;--shiki-default:#EEFFFF;--shiki-dark:#BABED8}html pre.shiki code .sfazB, html code.shiki .sfazB{--shiki-light:#91B859;--shiki-default:#C3E88D;--shiki-dark:#C3E88D}html pre.shiki code .spNyl, html code.shiki .spNyl{--shiki-light:#9C3EDA;--shiki-default:#C792EA;--shiki-dark:#C792EA}html pre.shiki code .s2Zo4, html code.shiki .s2Zo4{--shiki-light:#6182B8;--shiki-default:#82AAFF;--shiki-dark:#82AAFF}html pre.shiki code .sHwdD, html code.shiki .sHwdD{--shiki-light:#90A4AE;--shiki-light-font-style:italic;--shiki-default:#546E7A;--shiki-default-font-style:italic;--shiki-dark:#676E95;--shiki-dark-font-style:italic}html .light .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-light);background: var(--shiki-light-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-light-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-light-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-light-text-decoration);}html.light .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-light);background: var(--shiki-light-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-light-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-light-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-light-text-decoration);}html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html.dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html pre.shiki code .sBMFI, html code.shiki .sBMFI{--shiki-light:#E2931D;--shiki-default:#FFCB6B;--shiki-dark:#FFCB6B}html pre.shiki code .swJcz, html code.shiki .swJcz{--shiki-light:#E53935;--shiki-default:#F07178;--shiki-dark:#F07178}"]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"the-data-flow","depth":2,"text":"The Data Flow"},{"id":"the-task-registry","depth":2,"text":"The Task Registry"},{"id":"shared-state","depth":2,"text":"Shared State"}]}}', 'The four conceptual stages of iridis and how data flows through the shared PaletteState.', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/02-architecture', '{"title":"2. Core Architecture","description":"The four conceptual stages of iridis and how data flows through the shared PaletteState."}', '02-architecture', '3ZxbJONqqzaV01CobOVMiNL3NawQpB8YD0ZR6fguXeo'); -- 3ZxbJONqqzaV01CobOVMiNL3NawQpB8YD0ZR6fguXeo
INSERT INTO _content_docs VALUES ('docs/03-plugins-and-cli.md', '3. Plugins & CLI', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"A plugin is any object that satisfies ",["code",{},"PluginInterface"]," by providing a collection of tasks."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"interface PluginInterface {\n  readonly name:    string;\n  readonly version: string;\n  tasks(): readonly TaskInterface[];\n}\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"interface"],["span",{"class":"sBMFI"}," PluginInterface"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"  readonly"],["span",{"class":"swJcz"}," name"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sBMFI"},"    string"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"  readonly"],["span",{"class":"swJcz"}," version"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sBMFI"}," string"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  tasks"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"():"],["span",{"class":"spNyl"}," readonly"],["span",{"class":"sBMFI"}," TaskInterface"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"[]"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"}\n"]]]],["p",{},"When you call ",["code",{},"engine.adopt(plugin)"],", iridis registers all of the plugin''s tasks into the engine''s ",["code",{},"TaskRegistry"]," in one call."],["h2",{"id":"official-plugins"},"Official Plugins"],["p",{},"iridis ships with an ecosystem of plugins designed to format the resolved palette into consumer-ready code. Each is published as a separate ",["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-*"]," package:"],["ul",{},["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-stylesheet"],": Emits generic CSS custom properties (",["code",{},"--c-primary: #..."],")."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-tailwind"],": Emits a Tailwind CSS ",["code",{},"tailwind.config.js"]," or ",["code",{},"theme()"]," compatible object."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-shadcn"],": Emits CSS variables specifically structured for ",["code",{},"shadcn/ui"]," integration."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-mui"],": Emits a Material UI ",["code",{},"createTheme()"]," compatible palette object."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-chakra"],": Emits Chakra UI color tokens for ",["code",{},"extendTheme()"],"."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-panda"],": Emits Panda CSS token configuration."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-vscode"],": Derives a full VS Code theme JSON (",["code",{},"tokenColors"],", ",["code",{},"semanticTokenColors"],", and workbench UI elements)."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-capacitor"],": Emits native status bar colors, splash screen config, and Android ",["code",{},"theme.xml"]," for Capacitor mobile apps."],["li",{},["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-rdf"],": Emits the palette as an RDF/OWL semantic graph."]],["h2",{"id":"the-cli-runner"},"The CLI Runner"],["p",{},"You don''t have to write Node.js scripts to use iridis. The ",["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-cli"]," package allows you to run the engine directly from your terminal using a JSON configuration file."],["pre",{"className":"language-bash shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"npm install -g @studnicky/iridis-cli\n\niridis ./palette.config.json\n","language":"bash","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sBMFI"},"npm"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," install"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," -g"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," @studnicky/iridis-cli\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"sBMFI"},"iridis"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"}," ./palette.config.json\n"]]]],["p",{},"The CLI dynamically imports and runs the plugins defined in your configuration file. This makes it perfect for integrating into CI/CD pipelines, build scripts, or code generation workflows."],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .spNyl, html code.shiki .spNyl{--shiki-light:#9C3EDA;--shiki-default:#C792EA;--shiki-dark:#C792EA}html pre.shiki code .sBMFI, html code.shiki .sBMFI{--shiki-light:#E2931D;--shiki-default:#FFCB6B;--shiki-dark:#FFCB6B}html pre.shiki code .sMK4o, html code.shiki .sMK4o{--shiki-light:#39ADB5;--shiki-default:#89DDFF;--shiki-dark:#89DDFF}html pre.shiki code .swJcz, html code.shiki .swJcz{--shiki-light:#E53935;--shiki-default:#F07178;--shiki-dark:#F07178}html pre.shiki code .sTEyZ, html code.shiki .sTEyZ{--shiki-light:#90A4AE;--shiki-default:#EEFFFF;--shiki-dark:#BABED8}html .light .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-light);background: var(--shiki-light-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-light-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-light-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-light-text-decoration);}html.light .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-light);background: var(--shiki-light-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-light-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-light-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-light-text-decoration);}html .default .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-default-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html.dark .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-dark);background: var(--shiki-dark-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-dark-font-style);font-weight: var(--shiki-dark-font-weight);text-decoration: var(--shiki-dark-text-decoration);}html pre.shiki code .sfazB, html code.shiki .sfazB{--shiki-light:#91B859;--shiki-default:#C3E88D;--shiki-dark:#C3E88D}"]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"official-plugins","depth":2,"text":"Official Plugins"},{"id":"the-cli-runner","depth":2,"text":"The CLI Runner"}]}}', 'Extend iridis with framework-specific output formats or run it directly from your terminal.', 'md', '{}', 'true', '/03-plugins-and-cli', '{"title":"3. Plugins & CLI","description":"Extend iridis with framework-specific output formats or run it directly from your terminal."}', '03-plugins-and-cli', 'CFPcuO9e4ZeP2bh7qlMkRuXcAiZkEs-fVB8xM7n35kQ'); -- CFPcuO9e4ZeP2bh7qlMkRuXcAiZkEs-fVB8xM7n35kQ
INSERT INTO _content_docs VALUES ('docs/04-integration.md', '4. Seamless Integration', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"Integrating Iridis into an existing application shouldn''t require rewriting all of your CSS or switching out your Tailwind classes. Consumers can adopt Iridis effortlessly by presenting their existing color tokens and mapping them directly to the variables Iridis outputs."],["p",{},"Your goal is to configure Iridis to target the CSS Custom Properties (variables) your app already uses."],["h2",{"id":"the-strategy-css-variable-mapping"},"The Strategy: CSS Variable Mapping"],["p",{},"Most modern UI frameworks (like Tailwind CSS, Nuxt UI, Shadcn, MUI, or Bootstrap) rely on CSS variables under the hood. If your app already uses classes like ",["code",{},"text-primary"]," or ",["code",{},"bg-surface"],", those are typically backed by a variable like ",["code",{},"--color-primary"]," or ",["code",{},"--surface"],"."],["p",{},"Instead of replacing ",["code",{},"text-primary"]," with something else, you simply ",["strong",{},"tell Iridis to overwrite ",["code",{},"--color-primary"]],"."],["p",{},"There are two primary ways to do this:"],["h3",{"id":"_1-direct-alignment-emit-custom-keys"},"1. Direct Alignment (Emit Custom Keys)"],["p",{},"If your existing application expects variables named ",["code",{},"--brand-main"],", ",["code",{},"--bg-base"],", and ",["code",{},"--text-body"],", you can define an Iridis Role Schema that exactly matches those names. Iridis''s ",["code",{},"emit:cssVars"]," (from ",["code",{},"@studnicky/iridis-stylesheet"],") will generate the CSS using those exact keys."],["pre",{"className":"language-ts shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"import { Engine } from ''@studnicky/iridis'';\n\nconst schema = {\n  roles: [\n    { name: ''brand-main'', /* ... */ },\n    { name: ''bg-base'', /* ... */ },\n    { name: ''text-body'', /* ... */ }\n  ]\n};\n\n// ... engine setup ...\nconst state = await engine.run({\n  colors: [''#00FF00'', ''#FF0000''],\n  roles: schema\n});\n\n// Outputs:\n// :root {\n//   --brand-main: #...;\n//   --bg-base: #...;\n//   --text-body: #...;\n// }\n","language":"ts","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"s7zQu"},"import"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," Engine"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }"],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"}," from"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"@studnicky/iridis"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," schema "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  roles"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," [\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"    {"],["span",{"class":"swJcz"}," name"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"brand-main"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sHwdD"}," /* ... */"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," },\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"    {"],["span",{"class":"swJcz"}," name"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"bg-base"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sHwdD"}," /* ... */"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," },\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"    {"],["span",{"class":"swJcz"}," name"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"text-body"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sHwdD"}," /* ... */"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  ]\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"};\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"// ... engine setup ...\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":12},["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"const"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," state "],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"="],["span",{"class":"s7zQu"}," await"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," engine"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"."],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"},"run"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"("],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"{\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":13},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  colors"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," ["],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"#00FF00"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},","],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," ''"],["span",{"class":"sfazB"},"#FF0000"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"''"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"]"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},",\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":14},["span",{"class":"swJcz"},"  roles"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," schema\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":15},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"}"],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},")"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},";\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":16},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":17},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"// Outputs:\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":18},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"// :root {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":19},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"//   --brand-main: #...;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":20},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"//   --bg-base: #...;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":21},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"//   --text-body: #...;\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":22},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"// }\n"]]]],["p",{},"When you inject this generated CSS into your ",["code",{},"<head>"],", your existing CSS and components will instantly react to the new scheme without a single code change."],["h3",{"id":"_2-the-key-val-alias-map"},"2. The ",["code",{},"{ key: val }"]," Alias Map"],["p",{},"If you prefer to use the standard Iridis schema (which handles complex contrast logic seamlessly for roles like ",["code",{},"background"],", ",["code",{},"brand"],", ",["code",{},"text"],", etc.) but need it to interface with your existing variables, you can simply write a CSS mapping block."],["p",{},"Generate the standard Iridis CSS variables, and then map your app''s variables to point to them:"],["pre",{"className":"language-css shiki shiki-themes material-theme-lighter material-theme material-theme-palenight","code":"/* Your app''s existing theme file */\n:root {\n  /* Map your existing tokens to Iridis''s outputs */\n  --color-primary: var(--iridis-brand);\n  --color-primary-hover: var(--iridis-brand-600);\n  \n  --bg-surface: var(--iridis-background);\n  --text-main: var(--iridis-text);\n  \n  --border-color: var(--iridis-muted);\n}\n","language":"css","meta":"","style":""},["code",{"__ignoreMap":""},["span",{"class":"line","line":1},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"/* Your app''s existing theme file */\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":2},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"spNyl"},"root"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"}," {\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":3},["span",{"class":"sHwdD"},"  /* Map your existing tokens to Iridis''s outputs */\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":4},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  --color-primary"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," var"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"("],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"--iridis-brand"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":5},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  --color-primary-hover"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," var"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"("],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"--iridis-brand-600"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":6},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":7},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  --bg-surface"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," var"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"("],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"--iridis-background"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":8},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"}," var"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"("],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"--iridis-text"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":9},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  \n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":10},["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"  --border-color"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},":"],["span",{"class":"s2Zo4"}," var"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"("],["span",{"class":"sTEyZ"},"--iridis-muted"],["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},");\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":11},["span",{"class":"sMK4o"},"}\n"]]]],["p",{},"With this single mapping block, the entire Iridis pipeline (including contrast checking and synthesis) powers your existing UI, guaranteeing that your application remains fully responsive to any palette change."],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .s7zQu, html code.shiki .s7zQu{--shiki-light:#39ADB5;--shiki-light-font-style:italic;--shiki-default:#89DDFF;--shiki-default-font-style:italic;--shiki-dark:#89DDFF;--shiki-dark-font-style:italic}html pre.shiki code .sMK4o, pre.shiki code .spNyl, html code.shiki .spNyl{--shiki-light:#9C3EDA;--shiki-default:#C792EA;--shiki-dark:#C792EA}html pre.shiki code .swJcz, html code.shiki html code.shiki .s2Zo4{--shiki-light:#6182B8;--shiki-default:#82AAFF;--shiki-dark:#82AAFF}html .light .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-light);background: var(--shiki-light-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-text-decoration);}html .shiki span {color: var(--shiki-default);background: var(--shiki-default-bg);font-style: var(--shiki-default-font-style);font-weight:
